summary: This document is an Excel sheet detailing logic archetypes for fine-tuning AI conversational agents. It utilizes a fictional wedding planner scenario to demonstrate how the system prioritizes direct user questions, primary goals, and transitions between objectives. The content outlines specific interaction flows and assistant goals intended to guide the AI's response behavior.
